title: eriochloa acrotricha
intro: Eriochloa acrotricha, also known as Indian cupgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Eriochloa acrotricha include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
